intro: Cleistocalyx pennelii, also known as the Malabar ironwood or ironwood tree, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the family Myrtaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The bioactive constituents of Cleistocalyx pennelii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
